pageProps.content:
["$r",null,null,{"children":[["$r","h2",null,{"id":"项目简介","children":"项目简介"}],"
",["$r","p",null,{"children":"本镜像提供 Debian/Ubuntu/Fedora/CentOS/RHEL 的 docker 软件包。"}],"
",["$r","p",null,{"children":[["$r","strong",null,{"children":["注意：",["$r","strong",null,{"children":"本镜像"}],"不是"]}]," dockerhub 。"]}],"
",["$r","h2",null,{"id":"自动安装方式","children":"自动安装方式"}],"
",["$r","p",null,{"children":"Docker 提供了一个自动配置与安装的脚本，支持 Debian、RHEL、SUSE 系列及衍生系统的安装。请注意，Docker 官方不建议在生产环境使用此脚本安装 Docker CE。"}],"
",["$r","p",null,{"children":"以下内容假定"}],"
",["$r","ul",null,{"children":["
",["$r","li",null,{"children":"您为 root 用户，或有 sudo 权限，或知道 root 密码；"}],"
",["$r","li",null,{"children":"您系统上有 curl 或 wget"}],"
"]}],"
",["$r","CodeBlock",null,{"menus":[],"templateId":"template-0","codeLanguage":"bash"}],"
",["$r","h3",null,{"id":"debianubunturaspbian-用户","children":"Debian/Ubuntu/Raspbian 用户"}],"
",["$r","p",null,{"children":["以下内容根据 ",["$r","a",null,{"href":"https://docs.docker.com/engine/install/debian/","rel":"nofollow","children":"官方文档"}]," 修改而来。"]}],"
",["$r","p",null,{"children":"如果你过去安装过 docker，先删掉："}],"
",["$r","CodeBlock",null,{"menus":[],"templateId":"template-1","codeLanguage":"bash"}],"
",["$r","p",null,{"children":"首先安装依赖："}],"
",["$r","CodeBlock",null,{"menus":[],"templateId":"template-2","codeLanguage":"bash"}],"
",["$r","p",null,{"children":"信任 Docker 的 GPG 公钥并添加仓库："}],"
",["$r","CodeBlock",null,{"menus":[{"title":"发行版","items":[["Debian",{"deb_release":"debian"}],["Ubuntu",{"deb_release":"ubuntu"}],["Raspbian",{"deb_release":"raspbian"}]]}],"templateId":"template-3","codeLanguage":"bash"}],"
",["$r","p",null,{"children":"最后安装"}],"
",["$r","CodeBlock",null,{"menus":[],"templateId":"template-4","codeLanguage":"bash"}],"
",["$r","h3",null,{"id":"fedora","children":"Fedora"}],"
",["$r","p",null,{"children":["以下内容根据 ",["$r","a",null,{"href":"https://docs.docker.com/engine/install/fedora/","rel":"nofollow","children":"官方文档"}]," 修改而来。"]}],"
",["$r","p",null,{"children":"如果你之前安装过 docker，请先删掉："}],"
",["$r","CodeBlock",null,{"menus":[],"templateId":"template-5","codeLanguage":"bash"}],"
",["$r","p",null,{"children":"安装依赖，下载 repo 文件，并把软件仓库地址替换为镜像站："}],"
",["$r","CodeBlock",null,{"menus":[],"templateId":"template-6","codeLanguage":"bash"}],"
",["$r","p",null,{"children":"最后安装："}],"
",["$r","CodeBlock",null,{"menus":[],"templateId":"template-7","codeLanguage":"bash"}],"
",["$r","h3",null,{"id":"centosrhel","children":"CentOS/RHEL"}],"
",["$r","p",null,{"children":["以下内容根据 ",["$r","a",null,{"href":"https://docs.docker.com/engine/install/centos/","rel":"nofollow","children":"官方文档"}]," 修改而来。"]}],"
",["$r","p",null,{"children":"如果你之前安装过 docker，请先删掉"}],"
",["$r","CodeBlock",null,{"menus":[],"templateId":"template-8","codeLanguage":"bash"}],"
",["$r","p",null,{"children":"安装依赖，下载 repo 文件，并把软件仓库地址替换为镜像站："}],"
",["$r","CodeBlock",null,{"menus":[{"title":"发行版","items":[["CentOS",{"rh_release":"centos"}],["RHEL",{"rh_release":"rhel"}]]}],"templateId":"template-9","codeLanguage":"bash"}],"
",["$r","p",null,{"children":"最后安装："}],"
",["$r","CodeBlock",null,{"menus":[],"templateId":"template-10","codeLanguage":"bash"}],"
",["$r","h2",null,{"id":"openmediavault","children":"OpenMediaVault"}],"
",["$r","p",null,{"children":["本节供 ",["$r","a",null,{"href":"../OpenMediaVault/","children":"OpenMediaVault 帮助"}],"使用。"]}],"
",["$r","CodeBlock",null,{"menus":[],"templateId":"template-11","codeLanguage":"bash"}]]}]
